div.p: FSync Policy: Header must only be updated after both payload segments are acknowledged by the storage controller.
Boundary Check: AvailableSpace = Total - Head 1024 - 1000 = 24 blocks Required (100) > Available (24) Result: Multi-segment write required.
Sub-Operation A: LinearSize = MIN(100, 1024 - 1000) = 24 DMA_Write(buffer, phys_addr(1000), 24) Progress: 24/100 blocks.
Sub-Operation B: Remaining = 100 - 24 = 76 DMA_Write(buffer + 24, phys_addr(0), 76) Progress: 100/100 blocks.

ol.li: Wait for DMA segment A + B.
